query_text: Design a 7-day travel itinerary for 1 person departing from Detroit to visit 3 cities in California from November 1st to November 7th, 2024. The budget is $10,800. The plan should include European cuisine options and visits to sights and landmarks. Accommodations and transportation preferences are not specified, but the house rule excludes children under 10.

properties.description: Cowgirls and Cowboys in the West is a Western Heritage attraction located on the rim of Palo Duro Canyon, in Amarillo, Texas- near historic Route 66. We offer horseback riding and other activities that focus on the heritage of the Real West. At our venue, we not only offer horseback riding, but also private and public chuck wagon meals for groups that includes cowboy entertainment, and a venue to learn about horsemanship, Old West History and also specific history of the Palo Duro Area. In addition, we also offer city tours, route 66 tours, and progressive tours that follow the trails of Cowboys and Indians and the trails leading up to the Santa Fe Trail. Join us and step back in time to the Old West, and experience ranching life in the New West.
properties.address: 19100 South FM 1258 Los Cedros Ranch, Amarillo, TX 79118
properties.rankingString: #1 of 101 things to do in Amarillo
properties.localName: Cowgirls and Cowboys in the West
properties.name: Cowgirls and Cowboys in the West

properties.description: The Martin House (Buffalo, NY, 1903-05) exemplifies Frank Lloyd Wright’s Prairie House ideal and ranks as one of his finest residential works. Tour schedules change throughout the year, so please visit our website for the most up-to-date schedule as you plan your visit. Designed for Larkin Soap Company executive, Darwin D. Martin, the multi-residential estate is a one-of-a-kind composition consisting of the main Martin House, the Barton House, a carriage house with chauffeur’s quarters and stables, a glass-roofed conservatory linked to the main house by a 100-foot pergola, and a gardener’s cottage. Tours explore the restored and reconstructed buildings, surrounding landscape, and an extensive collection of art glass and furnishings, all designed by Wright, which together form a totally integrated architectural masterwork. We welcome you to this National Historic Landmark.

properties.description: Designed and built in 1930 by architect Davis Castle, the landmark Paramount Theatre in Abilene, Texas has a rich and significant history. A beautiful example of the nostalgic “atmospheric” movie theatre, it was built in an era when movie-going was meant to be a grand experience that transported you to another time and place. The theatre’s main auditorium space was designed to re-create a Spanish / Moorish courtyard at night, complete with projected clouds passing over a neon-lit night sky fitted with twinkling stars. The Paramount, restored in 1987 and renovated to accommodate live theatre, is now the home to a myriad of events, including film, ballet, opera, and concerts. For over 89 years it has stood the test of time as an entreatment showcase of West Texas.

properties.name: James Martin Manchester
properties.description: James Martin Manchester named in The Sunday Times Top 100 Restaurants 2015 is the signature restaurant at Manchester235 Casino, set away from the main gaming floor on its own mezzanine floor. This spectacular 170-seat restaurant spotlights original features of the historic Great Northern warehouse, such as exposed brick work and industrial-chic steel girders. These, together with natural daylight and James' own selection of luxury vintage-style fabrics and artwork, make for an incredible dining space. But while the unique setting is inviting, the main reason to the visit is the food. James Martin, well-known and loved for his cookery shows on the BBC and Channel 4, has produced a classic, a la carte menu of the highest quality. It includes some tried and tested James Martin favourites and makes the most of local produce from renowned butchers, fishmongers, game dealers, farmers and cheese makers. The a la carte menu will change seasonally so you can enjoy a new gastronomic experience throughout the year. Just a stone's throw from Deansgate Rail Station, James Martin's Manchester restaurant is tucked inside the glamorous Manchester235 casino, making it a glamorous and ideal rendezvous, away from the vibrant pace of the city.
properties.address: 2 Watson Street, Manchester M3 4LP England

properties.name: Place Pigalle Restaurant and Bar
properties.description: Located in the Pike Place Market in Downtown Seattle. Behind where they throw the fish! Enter Place Pigalle's intimate dining room and you've found yourself in a quaint old-world parlour overlooking Seattle's Puget Sound. With appointments reminiscent of yesteryear, Place Pigalle's cozy quarters offer stunning views from every table. You may also choose to dine on our summer patio which overlooks market architecture, Elliot Bay and the majestic Olympic Mountain Range.
properties.address: 81 Pike St Pike Place Market, Seattle, WA 98101-2024
